photos.captionKii: I remember capturing this detailed shot of another one of Tbilisi's captivating old buildings, its weathered facade telling so many stories. The peeling, salmon-colored paint reveals layers of history, and the intricate dark metalwork of the balcony stands out, adding an elegant contrast. I was drawn to the subtle architectural details around the windows and the way the building's age was so visibly present, from the slightly deteriorating roofline to the old antennas reaching towards the overcast sky. It perfectly encapsulated the authentic, historic character I was finding in so many corners

photos.caption: Непереводимая брань — А вот и пояснение что это такое :) ru.youtube.com/watch?v=E5PdqUSRwGU
photos.captionKii: I remember spotting this rather striking yellow sticker on the hood of a silver car while walking around. The bold red Cyrillic text, 'КОКОЙТЫ, ФЕНДАРАСТ!', immediately caught my attention. It was clearly a strong political statement, likely a derogatory one, considering the tone and the context of the region at the time. Seeing messages like this plastered on vehicles gave me a real sense of the local political sentiments and undercurrents in the city during my exploration, adding another layer to my understanding of the urban environment beyond just its architecture and landmarks.

photos.caption: Балкон на тротуаре
photos.captionKii: I remember encountering this striking old building while wandering through Tbilisi. What really caught my eye was its magnificent, deeply curved wooden balcony, an architectural style I'd come to appreciate here. The intricate carvings and the way it hugged the corner of the building gave it such character, even with its slightly weathered facade. The overcast sky added a certain atmospheric charm, making the details of the wood and the surrounding greenery of the trees stand out against the muted tones of the street and building.

photos.caption: Что-то про любовь?
photos.captionKii: I remember coming across this intriguing sight on a hillside overlooking Tbilisi. It was a bush, completely adorned with countless colorful rags and strips of fabric tied to its branches, almost like a wish tree or a local custom. From this elevated spot, I had another fantastic, albeit a bit overcast, view of the city sprawling below, with its houses and a distant structure on another hill. This bush felt like a quiet, poignant piece of the city's cultural tapestry, a unique discovery amidst our urban exploration, offering a different kind of insight into Tbilisi.

photos.caption: Панорама
photos.captionKii: I remember this breathtaking panoramic view of Tbilisi, captured from a high vantage point that offered a sweeping perspective of the city. The Kura River snaked through the urban landscape, its banks lined with lush green trees, and multiple bridges gracefully spanned its waters, connecting different parts of the city. Below, I could see a dense tapestry of buildings, many with distinctive red-tiled roofs, blending into the hills in the distance under a softly overcast sky. In the foreground, a prominent domed building, possibly an old church, stood out among the other structures, adding to t

photos.caption: Если у вас нет балкона, то учитесь!
photos.captionKii: I remember walking through these charming, older parts of Tbilisi, capturing the unique character of the city's architecture. This image shows a couple of multi-story houses with distinct features; one on the left has faded, peeling plaster revealing brick, and a wooden staircase leading up to an upper level. The house next to it has a striking wooden balcony extending outwards, a common and beautiful architectural element here. The street below is cobbled, adding to the historic feel, and a small black cat is casually strolling across it, oblivious to the parked dark car. The overcast sky rea

photos.caption: Обычный пейзаж
photos.captionKii: I remember this incredible panoramic view I captured while exploring Tbilisi, looking out over a collection of older, more weathered buildings with their charmingly dilapidated facades. The sky was overcast, giving everything a muted, historical feel. I was particularly drawn to the building on the right with its pale blue paint peeling away to reveal the brick underneath, and the rustic wooden balcony. In the distance, nestled on top of a rugged hill, I could clearly see a distinct domed church or monastery, a beautiful landmark against the cityscape. It was a stark contrast to some of the mo

photos.caption: Мудаков добили, рельсы только и остались
photos.captionKii: I remember noticing this fascinating piece of old metalwork during my exploration, likely in Tbilisi. It was a close-up shot of a rusty, heavy metal beam or rail, firmly attached to a wooden post with a metal band. What really caught my eye were the embossed Cyrillic letters: 'VШ.СССР'. Seeing 'СССР' (USSR) stamped on it was a clear reminder of the region's history and how fragments of the past are still visible in the urban landscape. It was a detail that added another layer to the city's story, a subtle nod to its Soviet legacy amidst all the other discoveries.

photos.caption: Два мучача пили "Чача"
photos.captionKii: I remember taking a break at an outdoor cafe, where we had a map spread out on the wooden table, perhaps planning our next route or just reminiscing about our journey. There was a bottle of 'ЧАЧА 61', a local spirit, and my camcorder, ready to capture more memories, alongside our mobile phones. I can see a friend in a striped shirt sitting next to me, and another friend with long red hair across the table, seemingly engrossed in her phone. It was a relaxed moment, a typical stop to refuel and strategize during our urban exploration.

photos.caption: Есть тут и романтике место
photos.captionKii: I remember being struck by this beautiful piece of street art I discovered while exploring Tbilisi. It's a stencil artwork on a warm, pinkish-brown wall, depicting a scene reminiscent of Klimt's 'The Kiss.' The intricate swirling patterns on one figure's dress and the more angular, abstract shapes forming the other figure were really captivating. It was fascinating to see such a classical-inspired work translated into urban art, adding another layer of artistic expression to the city's walls. The subtle crack in the wall near the bottom just added to its raw, authentic charm.

photos.caption: Капля Европы в хаосе Востока
photos.captionKii: I remember walking through this charming pedestrian area in Tbilisi, which was beautifully set up as an outdoor cafe. The numerous tables and wicker chairs, both dark and light-colored, looked incredibly inviting under the cloudy sky, suggesting a perfect spot to relax and people-watch. I noticed the quaint architecture surrounding this space, with old buildings sporting balconies and awnings. One building on the left even had a red-tiled roof and what looked like a Buddha statue near its entrance, while another, surprisingly, displayed a modern advertisement for new apartments, creating a str

photos.caption: Чучачо!
photos.captionKii: I remember coming across this rather whimsical bronze statue on a charming cobblestone street in Tbilisi. The small figure was sitting contemplatively on a stone block, holding what looked like a small horn or trumpet, adding a touch of artistic character to the urban landscape. I noticed how the detailed cobblestone pavement created a circular pattern around its base. There were also a couple of large, decorative pots with small green plants nearby, which added a bit of greenery to the scene. In the background, I could see other old buildings, parked cars, and even a person walking in the dis

photos.caption: Один дом поссорился с другим
photos.captionKii: I remember looking up at this fascinating cluster of buildings in Tbilisi, capturing the striking contrasts and the raw, unpolished character of the city. On the left, a light yellow building with an elaborate blue grated window stood next to a very narrow, crumbling grey structure, almost appearing squeezed between its neighbors. This middle building, with its exposed brickwork and barred windows, looked particularly ancient and worn. To the right, a distinctive terracotta-red building with a sharp, angled roofline added another layer of texture and color, and I noticed a small wooden balcony

photos.caption: Еще одна жилая улица
photos.captionKii: I remember walking through this quiet, narrow street in Tbilisi, which gave me a real sense of the city's older residential areas. The buildings on both sides looked quite weathered, with peeling paint and visible signs of age, yet they retained their unique character. Many had these rustic, often metal, balconies on their upper floors, some looking a bit precarious but adding to the charm. I also noticed the crisscrossing electrical wires strung between the buildings, a common sight here, and the somewhat uneven pavement underfoot. It felt like a truly authentic glimpse into the everyday urba

photos.caption: Решетки на всех окнах во всем городе!
photos.captionKii: I remember capturing this image of a typical storefront or ground-floor space in Tbilisi, showcasing another facet of the city's urban environment. The large windows were secured by sturdy, accordion-style metal gates – one a clean white, the other a worn yellowish hue – which I noticed were a common sight for businesses here. The concrete facade of the building looked quite weathered, with visible stains and remnants of posters on the wall to the right, hinting at stories of daily use and the passage of time. I also noticed the sturdy concrete pillars and beams supporting the structure above,

photos.caption: WTF?
photos.captionKii: I remember stumbling upon this vibrant pink wall during my walk through Tbilisi, which immediately caught my eye. It was adorned with this striking black stencil art, depicting a person with long hair, intently looking up through what appears to be a telescope or a camera. Next to it, the words 'ILLEGA KOSNAVTIKA' were stenciled, hinting at 'illegal cosmonautics' or some intriguing, perhaps rebellious, theme. There was also some faint red text on a white sign higher up, likely in Georgian script. It was another wonderful example of the city's unexpected artistic expressions adding character to

photos.caption: М = Ж? Не везде...
photos.captionKii: I remember noticing this interesting detail on a red concrete barrier during my exploration of Tbilisi. Plastered on its grimy surface were several white posters, each clearly depicting a male stick figure, an equals sign, and a female stick figure, conveying a powerful message about gender equality. There was also some text in what looked like Georgian script above the figures, adding to the local flavor. The barrier itself was quite weathered, with some purple paint splatters or graffiti, truly a snapshot of the city's lived-in environment.

photos.caption: В Киеве бы так
photos.captionKii: I remember walking along this wide, inviting sidewalk in Tbilisi, appreciating how beautifully designed the public spaces were. The tall trees were planted in these clever square wooden planters that doubled as benches, providing a nice place to rest. Beyond them, there was a neat row of vibrant pink and red flowers, and behind that, an impressive, ornate white building with large, arched windows and classical architectural details. Seeing people strolling leisurely in the distance really added to the calm, pleasant atmosphere of the city's urban environment.

photos.caption: Билайн
photos.captionKii: I remember seeing this Beeline store facade while exploring Tbilisi, which really stood out with its bright yellow and black striped design against the older, peach-colored building. The prominent sign with the Georgian script, 'ბილაინი', made it feel distinctly local, even though it's a well-known telecom brand. It was interesting to see how these modern commercial elements were integrated into the historic urban fabric, with the traditional windows and an ornate balcony visible just above. It was another glimpse into the everyday life and mixture of eras within the city.

photos.caption: Я
photos.captionKii: I remember capturing this wide shot of a man resting on one of the ornate benches lining a vibrant street in Tbilisi. The long flower beds were bursting with beautiful red and pink blooms, adding such a lively splash of color to the urban landscape. Behind him, the street was bustling with cars and a yellow bus, with the characteristic multi-story buildings and lush trees of the city visible in the background under an overcast sky. It felt like a perfect moment to capture the blend of daily city life and its unexpected pockets of beauty, as we explored the streets.

photos.caption: Старинный кирпич
photos.captionKii: I remember being captivated by the textures and history embedded in the walls of Tbilisi. This particular close-up shot really highlights the rugged, aged brickwork and thick mortar that I saw everywhere. The way the light catches the uneven surfaces, and how the rows of bricks stretch into the distance, really conveyed a sense of the city's ancient foundations and character. It was fascinating to notice these smaller details as I walked through the old areas, contributing to the overall historic atmosphere.

photos.caption: Наружный лифт
photos.captionKii: I remember capturing this intriguing shot of a multi-story brick building, which really caught my eye with its unique mix of classic architecture and a rather distinctive modern addition. The rich red brick gives it a classic, sturdy feel, but then there's this unusual, almost industrial-looking external glass and metal elevator shaft jutting out from the side, a clear blend of old and new. I liked how the vines were growing lushly on the balconies and up the facade, adding a touch of green to the urban landscape. Below, several cars were parked, completing the everyday city scene under the ov

photos.caption: Дворик
photos.captionKii: I remember turning a corner during my exploration of Tbilisi and finding myself in this fascinating old inner courtyard. It felt like stepping into a hidden world, away from the main streets. The buildings were multi-storied with those characteristic wooden balconies and a very intricate, spiraling metal staircase leading up the side, giving everything a really historic and lived-in feel. There were even clothes hanging out to dry on the right, which added to the sense of everyday life happening here. The ground was unpaved and worn, and a set of old stone steps led up to another part of the c

photos.caption: Проход во дворик
photos.captionKii: I remember walking through these incredibly atmospheric, older parts of Tbilisi. This narrow, somewhat dark passage between buildings felt like a hidden path, leading to another hidden world. My friend, wearing an orange hoodie, and another person with reddish hair, were ahead of me, exploring the way. The walls were quite worn, with exposed timbers and some graffiti, really giving a sense of the city's age and character. It was fascinating to wander off the main streets and discover these quieter, more authentic corners, opening up to what looked like an outdoor courtyard or garden area at th

photos.caption: Fusion
photos.captionKii: I remember walking through the streets in Tbilisi and coming across this vibrant fruit stand. It was a clear day, and the array of fresh produce looked so appealing. The vendor, an older gentleman with a mustache, was busy arranging everything, surrounded by piles of juicy red cherries, green watermelons stacked high, bright yellow bananas, and an abundance of apples and other colorful berries. I could also see a sign above in Georgian script, and a bit of English text, which added to the local charm. It really captured a slice of everyday life and the bustling atmosphere of the city streets a

photos.caption: Кабельщики Грузии самые клевые!
photos.captionKii: I remember looking up and capturing this quintessential urban scene in Tbilisi, truly showcasing the city's unique infrastructure. The sky was dramatically overcast, with thick, heavy clouds creating a moody backdrop, much like the skies I'd seen earlier. In the foreground, there's a dense tangle of electrical wires and cables crisscrossing a tall utility pole, with a single street lamp hanging amongst them, perfectly illustrating the pervasive urban network. Around it, I can see snippets of different buildings – a darker, older one on the left with a small balcony, a more modern, lighter-colo

photos.caption: BARCAMP
photos.captionKii: I remember this really fun moment during the Barcamp event when we all gathered to do some light painting at night! We managed to spell out "BARCAMP" with long exposure, which was such a cool and creative way to capture the spirit of the event. There's a group of us, seven in total, all standing in a line, slightly blurred from the movement as we created the light trails. The background is dark, but I can make out some trees and a parked car, adding to the late-night outdoor vibe. It was a great way to wind down (or amp up!) the evening after a day of sessions, and this photo always makes me s

photos.caption: Ночной Тбилиси
photos.captionKii: I remember this beautiful view from my time in Tbilisi. It was nighttime, and looking out over the city, I was struck by all the twinkling lights spreading across the landscape. The city seemed to glow against the dark sky, with clusters of buildings illuminated, making the urban sprawl look quite magical. In the foreground, I can see the dark silhouettes of tree branches, adding a natural frame to the vast expanse of the city lights below. It was a peaceful moment, taking in the scale and beauty of Tbilisi at night.

photos.caption: Отаке!!!11
photos.captionKii: I remember seeing this large banner during the Barcamp event, which clearly outlined all the details. It announced "barcamp CAUCASUS" and specified the dates as "JUNE, 7-8 2008" and the location as "TBILISI." Below the main title, I could also see some of the key organizations that supported or sponsored the event, like the Open Society Institute and OSCE Mission to Georgia, and further down, names like PrivatBank. It was a really helpful sign, giving attendees all the essential information and a sense of the event's scale. I also recall seeing someone in a striped shirt and a cap standing nea

I'm in my orange cardigan and light green t-shirt, typing away on my white netbook, probably working on something for a session or just catching up. To my left, a friend in a red hoodie is also focused on his laptop, and I can see his event lanyard, showing his ID. Another friend in a white top is partially visible behind me, and someone else with dark, curly hair is also on a laptop further to the right. We're all gathered around on green chairs, making good use of the outdoor spa

I'm sitting there in my orange cardigan and light green t-shirt, looking out across the field, probably listening in on a conversation. In the background, there's this rustic wooden house that served as part of our venue, and I can see other attendees milling about or sitting on its porch, enjoying the fresh air and the views of the distant hills. photos.caption: Я говорю, тс-с-с-с-с...
photos.captionKii: I remember this particular moment from the Barcamp event, sitting in on one of the engaging outdoor sessions. The person in the orange cardigan and green t-shirt, who I’d seen around earlier, was up front, giving a detailed presentation. I was sitting further back, under this open wooden shelter, enjoying the talk

photos.caption: Бугагашечка
photos.captionKii: I remember this moment, sitting among friends and other attendees at what looks like an outdoor session or talk. photos.caption: Атомс и восточный поцелуй
photos.captionKii: I remember this really fun, candid moment with friends. This guy, with his sunglasses pushed back on his bald head, was making such a hilarious, exaggerated face, looking upwards with a sort of surprised or playful expression. And my friend, with her lovely swept-back hair and pretty red earrings, was leaning right in, puckering her lips as if to give him a quick, playful kiss or whisper a secret. It definitely feels like we were at some outdoor event or gathering, as I can see lanyards around their necks and hints of trees and wooden structures in the background. It was just one of those spon

photos.caption: Будьмо!
photos.captionKii: I remember this wonderful evening, sharing drinks and laughter with my friends. We're all smiling brightly, raising our glasses for a toast—it looks like a mix of white and red wine. My friend with the vibrant red hair is on the left, beaming, and another friend is next to me on the right, also with a big smile. I'm right in the middle, enjoying the moment. There are two wine bottles on the wooden table, adding to the relaxed, celebratory atmosphere of our gathering. It was definitely a night to remember, probably at a cozy restaurant or bar, given the warm lighting and the hint of other diner

photos.caption: В меню решительно ничего не понятно
photos.captionKii: I remember this moment, sitting across from a friend at what felt like a cozy, rustic restaurant. We were both looking over those incredibly unique, somewhat old-fashioned menus, taking our time to decide what to order. My friend, with her long red hair, was gesturing and talking, probably sharing a thought about the options or suggesting something. I was listening intently, glancing up from my own menu, just soaking in the relaxed atmosphere. The warm, dim lighting from the lamp above made the whole place feel so inviting, a perfect setting for an evening out.

photos.caption: Мужчина говорит!
photos.captionKii: I remember this lively evening gathering. We were all together at a long table in what felt like a very traditional, rustic setting, with warm brick walls and a wooden beamed ceiling, gently lit by hanging bulbs. I caught this moment where one of our friends, in a black shirt, was standing up, engaging with everyone, perhaps sharing a story or making a toast. The table was full of food, like fresh bread and other dishes, along with drinks in carafes and glasses. Everyone looked relaxed and engrossed in the conversation and the atmosphere of the night.

photos.caption: OMG!
photos.captionKii: I remember being captivated by this old building, which seemed to tell so many stories through its weathered walls and intricate wooden balconies. The way it was constructed, almost leaning into itself with multiple levels of rickety-looking wood, was fascinating. I could see the worn plaster, exposed pipes, and the rustic charm that comes with age. It felt like a true glimpse into the city's historical character, a stark but beautiful contrast to some of the grander landmarks, under what was a typical overcast sky that day.

photos.caption: Не только памятники, но и люди так танцуют!
photos.captionKii: I remember seeing this captivating bronze sculpture in a public space, depicting several figures in what looks like a dynamic dance or a dramatic narrative. One of the figures even appears to be holding a rifle, adding an intense element to the scene. The sculpture sits on a circular base, hinting at its importance as a public art piece. In the background, I captured a charming multi-story building with distinct colorful balconies, adding a pop of color with red, green, blue, and yellow railings against the white facade. The cloudy sky overhead gave the whole scene a thoughtful, somewhat drama

I remember strolling down this charming, narrow street in the city. The buildings had such character, with their old wooden balconies and distinct architectural styles. On the right, there was this lively outdoor cafe, bustling with people enjoying themselves at tables lining the cobblestone path. It felt like such a classic European street scene, and I even spotted a 'EURO 2008' sign, which was a fun detail that placed us right in that moment. People were walking, chatting, and soaking in the atmosphere, just like I was.

photos.caption: Какбе следид!!! Ленин жив!
photos.captionKii: I remember walking through the city streets and noticing this intriguing building. The bright red neon sign for 'K&B still watching you' really stood out against the older architecture. It felt a bit mysterious, and I wondered what kind of place it was. Above it, there was another sign in what looked like Georgian script, adding to the local feel. The green umbrella and awning suggested it might be a cafe or bar, a part of the vibrant street life I was experiencing during my city exploration.

photos.caption: Все, что нужно для счастья!
photos.captionKii: I remember pausing for a moment, notebook open, probably jotting down thoughts or ideas from a Barcamp session. The Moleskine is filled with my handwriting, and I can see the official Barcamp badge right there, with its distinctive logo. Next to it, there's a small Georgian flag, which reminds me of where I was at the time. Of course, no working session is complete without a warm cup of coffee, and this one looks like a perfect latte, ready to fuel more creativity. This quiet moment on the dark wooden table felt like a small anchor during what was likely a bustling event.

photos.caption: Кофе и Грузия - вещи не совместимые — Его тут почти нигде нет. Чача - есть, вино - есть, тархкн - есть, Баржоми - есть, а кофе - НЕТ!
photos.captionKii: I remember taking this close-up shot of my coffee and the Georgian flag right there on the table. It was such a nice detail that caught my eye, with the strong black coffee in the white cup and saucer next to the vibrant red and white of the flag. This was part of my relaxing break at an outdoor cafe, a perfect moment to just take it all in during my city exploration.

photos.caption: Опять я
photos.captionKii: I remember finding this cozy spot at an outdoor cafe to take a break and catch up on some things. I had my laptop open, probably answering emails or doing some light work, with a warm cup of coffee right next to it. What was fun were the two little flags on the table—the Italian flag and the Georgian flag—a nice reminder of the places I was exploring or perhaps just a decorative touch. In the background, I could see the charming old buildings of the city street, adding to the relaxed atmosphere.

It felt like a perfect way to unwind, just enjoying the atmosphere and good company after taking in the city's sights.

photos.caption: Дизайн - 5, внутри - фу!
photos.captionKii: I remember stumbling upon this 'Coffee Inn' during an evening walk. The warm, inviting glow from inside was a stark contrast to the dark night sky, making it stand out as a cozy spot. I loved how the light highlighted the modern architecture and the paved square leading up to it, with those gentle stairs in the background. It felt like a peaceful urban moment, perhaps a perfect place to stop for a warm drink, even if I only captured the exterior. The display window of the adjacent store on the left, with what look like mannequins, added to the city's quiet evening atmosphere.

photos.caption: Центральная площадь Каунаса
photos.captionKii: I remember capturing this wide, encompassing view of a grand city square bathed in the quiet darkness of night during one of our city explorations. The majestic neoclassical building on the right, with its imposing columns beautifully illuminated by warm light, stood out strikingly against the deep black sky, likely a prominent cathedral. To its left, the tall, slender bell tower pierced the darkness, also subtly lit. The expansive, empty square, with its patterned pavement, created a sense of scale and tranquility, reflecting some of the ambient light. Further in the distance, the faint glow

photos.caption: Фотограф
photos.captionKii: I remember this really striking perspective I captured during one of our nighttime city explorations. I was looking up at this magnificent church, all dramatically lit against the deep blue night sky, and decided to capture the moment. My face is visible at the very top, almost like a self-portrait taken from a low angle, wearing my red jacket, adding a personal touch to the vast scene. The warm light on the stone structure of the church beautifully highlighted its intricate architectural details, and the bare branches of the tree on the left added to the atmospheric feel. It was another capti

photos.caption: Пыщ!
photos.captionKii: I was so captivated by this majestic brick church at night. The way the warm artificial light illuminated its intricate Gothic architecture against the deep, twilight blue sky was absolutely stunning. I took this from a low angle to really emphasize its towering spires and impressive scale. There might have been some frost on the ground, making the whole scene feel quite cold but also incredibly serene. It was such a memorable sight, a truly grand landmark that I wanted to capture.

photos.caption: Заправка желудков
photos.captionKii: I remember this moment clearly, pulling over for a quick stop during a drive. We parked the silver car on the side of this quiet rural road, with the vast, open fields stretching out to the horizon and a dense forest lining the background under such a bright, clear blue sky with those lovely scattered clouds. I think that's me, wearing my dark jacket and orange sweater, looking into the open trunk, probably grabbing something or reorganizing. My friend, dressed in that long, warm brown coat, is standing nearby. It felt like a brief pause in a journey, just taking a moment to stretch our legs a

photos.caption: Эта карта парализовала таможенников всех границ!
photos.captionKii: I remember seeing this sticker prominently displayed on the hood of our silver car. It was the official BarCamp route, mapping out our incredible journey connecting cities like Rīga, Warszawa, Vilnius, Minsk, and Kyiv, each with their respective flags. The 'BALTICS' label near the sea really grounded our adventure geographically. This sticker perfectly encapsulated the scope and excitement of the road trip we were embarking on, suggesting a significant expedition across these different regions and communities. It felt like a symbol of the adventure ahead.

photos.caption: Кофе с печенькой
photos.captionKii: I absolutely loved the intricate patterns on this coffee cup and saucer! It felt so special, with those beautiful blue and red floral designs. I remember having a strong, dark coffee, possibly Turkish coffee or espresso, served perfectly in that charming cup. Alongside it, there were these two delightful little cookies, each with a light glaze and topped with colorful pieces of dried fruit, which added a lovely sweetness. The small spoon resting on the saucer just completed the inviting scene. It was a cozy moment, perfect for savoring a warm drink and a sweet treat, probably during a quiet mo

photos.caption: Шапка из взбитых сливок

What truly caught my eye was the thick, creamy layer on top, which I think was either foam or whipped cream. It was slowly, beautifully dripping down into the darker brown liquid below, creating these fascinating, intricate patterns along the inside of the glass. There’s also a light blue straw peeking out from the top left, ready for a sip. The background is softly blurred in a warm, light brown tone, making the drink really stand out. I must have been enjoying a relaxing moment, possib

photos.caption: (о:3 — Сделано нами :)
photos.captionKii: I just loved this adorable cat latte art! It was such a delightful surprise to see this cute face smiling up from my coffee. The white foam cat stands out perfectly against the creamy brown coffee, all served in this charming off-white cup with a bright yellow rim and saucer. It's those little touches that make a simple coffee break feel so special and memorable. I just had to capture it before I drank it all!

photos.caption: Та самая книга «Влейте в нее свое сердце»
photos.captionKii: I wanted to capture this book because it was incredibly interesting to me. The cover design is really appealing, featuring a coffee cup with a spoon on a saucer, and you can clearly see the Starbucks logo inside the cup. It looks like the book is resting on a simple wooden surface. I was really engrossed in learning about how such a massive brand was built, and it definitely piqued my interest in bus

They're wearing such a sweet pink onesie with a cute mouse design. I can see a fuzzy tiger toy behind them on the bed, and some colorful toys scattered nearby on the left. My hand or arm is just visible on the right, probably holding or supporting them, which reminds me of how much I cherish these everyday moments at home. It's such a pure, innocent expression, and I wanted to capture their calm and curious gaze.

It's such a joyful and playful interaction, and I wanted to remember this sweet expression and the feeling of bath time fun.

Her hand is playfully covering her eyes, but her big, happy grin is clearly visible below. They look so cozy and content, likely just having some fun on a bed with soft pillows in the background. It was one of those tender everyday moments I just had to capture to remember the joy and affection.

The soft light and the

photos.caption: Ужин

The meal is served on my brown, scalloped plate, sitting on a warm wooden surface. It was such a precious, intimate interaction, filled with so much love, and I'm glad I captured this memory of family time.

photos.captionKii: I remember this incredibly fun moment, playing with my baby in the park! We were enjoying the beautiful autumn day, with the sunlight filtering through the trees and leaves beginning to fall. I'm holding my little one upside down, and they're looking at the camera with such a sweet, curious expression. Their red top and denim overalls stand out against the green grass and trees. Moments like these, just being silly and joyful outdoors, are truly precious and I'm so glad I captured it.

She's standing cheerfully next to a textured birch tree, with her long, dark hair flowing around her as a flurry of golden yellow leaves cascade down. Her expression is so lighthearted, sticking her tongue out slightly in fun. The warm sunlight filters through the trees in the background, making the scene feel vibrant and truly capturing the joyful essence of fall in the park. It was a perfect snapshot of someone embracing the beauty and fun of the season.

photos.caption: Весна осенью — В такие моменты я понимаю, что сделал правильный выбор -- любимой жены, места жительства и фотоаппарата.
photos.captionKii: I remember capturing this beautiful, serene moment in what looks like an autumn park. A woman, with a gentle smile, stands leaning against a tall, light-barked tree, possibly a birch, bathed in dappled sunlight filtering through the leaves. What truly makes this image special are the vibrant yellow autumn leaves gracefully falling around her, creating a magical, almost ethereal atmosphere. The warm glow of the sun highlights the rich fall colors and the peaceful expression on her face. It was such a lovely representation of the season, and I wanted to freeze that perfect fall feeling.

photos.caption: Витязи — Солнце, ветер и водяная пыль запонили пространство настолько, что дышать стало решительно невозможно от переполняющей радости и благодарности за Жизнь!

There are three powerful figures, looking like ancient warriors, one holding a bow and another a spear, standing strong against the bright sunlight. The sun directly behind them creates such a striking backlight, making their forms stand out sharply against the blue sky. In the foreground, there's a cascade of water splashing, which suggests this monument is part of a fountain. It felt like a significant and heroic landmark, and I wanted to preserve that imposing image with the interplay of light and water.

It just perfectly captured the relaxed and casual atmosphere of our time by the water that day.

There are bits of green reeds growing near the bank, and a long stick or rod leans beside them. In the distance, the city skyline rises, featuring a distinctive pair of tall, twin buildings, and a bridge spanning the water. It was such a peaceful scene, watching someone find calm amidst such a beautiful backdrop, and I

photos.caption: ...соломки постелил — ...после фотографирования, услышав щелчки затвора, дядя повернулся и мило улыбнулся.
photos.captionKii: I remember this quiet moment by the river, where an elderly man sat peacefully on the concrete embankment. He was wearing a light jacket and a flat cap, appearing deeply absorbed in something in his lap or one of the bags next to him. A white cane rested nearby, and he had made a small cushion of dried reeds to sit on. The dark blue water flowed gently behind him, with patches of green grass and aquatic plants along the bank. It was a serene and contemplative scene that I felt compelled to capture, a snapshot of solitary calm amidst the day.

What really makes me smile is the little piece of white tissue stuck to their mouth and chin, while they're clutching another crumpled piece in their hand. It's such a typical baby moment, a little messy but utterly charming, capturing their innocent curiosity and playfulness under the open sky.

photos.caption: Сына и папа спят на ходу :)
photos.captionKii: I remember this incredibly sweet moment, captured outdoors under the bright sun, where the baby is fast asleep, nestled securely in a front carrier worn by a man. The baby is wearing a cozy light blue outfit and a little grey and dark blue beanie, looking so peaceful. The man, with his eyes gently closed, seems to be resting as well, enjoying the quiet moment together. It's such a tender scene of shared calm, with the urban background of buildings and streetlights hinting at our location, but all the focus is on this precious bond and the baby's serene sleep.

Their little tongue and the smooth gums are also visible, making it clear how new and fresh that tooth is. Every little change is so precious to document.

photos.caption: Снова за рулем

The building itself looked quite aged, with its grey stone blocks and numerous windows framed in orange, while the roof was a mix of metallic grey and a distinct green section on a taller part. It really added to the historical and somewhat industrial feel of the area I was exploring, contrasting with the ancient castle but clearly part of the broader landscape. The sign's pictogram, a black silhouette of a person tumbling down steps with a downward arrow, clearly indicated a hazard, likely a steep or uneven staircase within the ancient castle complex. It was a practical reminder amidst all the historical grandeur that even ancient sites require modern safety precautions, highlighting some of the ruggedness and potential dangers of exploring such old structures. photos.captionKii: I remember coming across this fascinating display of old cannons, perfectly lined up on a grassy area, likely within the castle grounds. There were so many of them, at least seven, each with sturdy wooden carriages and heavy metal barrels, looking like they were ready for battle centuries ago. The weathered wood and aged metal truly conveyed the history of this fortress. It really gave me a sense of the defensive power this castle once held and the intense past it witnessed. It was another amazing detail that brought the whole historical experience to life for me during my exploration.

photos.caption: Утварь — Раньше вещи имели очень приятное свойство -- у них цвет был почти одинаковым.
photos.captionKii: I remember looking down into this area and seeing a collection of old, rustic wooden carts, which really transported me back in time. They looked like something straight out of a medieval scene, with their sturdy wooden wheels and simple construction. Each cart was filled with various bundles, covered with worn canvas or cloth, along with ropes, hay, and other bits and pieces, suggesting they were once used for transporting goods or supplies around a castle or an old village. The grass they rest on and the overall weathered appearance just added to the authentic, historical feel of the place.

To its right, there's a section of the castle wall undergoing some kind of restoration or maintenance, with wooden scaffolding temporarily erected against it, giving a glimpse into the ongoing work to preserve these ancient structures. photos.captionKii: I remember seeing this old, bare lightbulb casting a warm, yellowish glow in what felt like a deeper, possibly utility or storage section of the ancient castle I was exploring. The rough-hewn stone walls, with their irregular shapes and visible mortar, created a very rustic and historical atmosphere. Below the light, I noticed an exposed, old-fashioned electrical box or switch, adding to the sense that this part of the castle had seen centuries of use and adaptation. It felt like a hidden corner, quietly illuminated, a testament to the castle's enduring structure.

photos.caption: Полет

Beyond the castle walls, I could make out parts of a village nestled among green hills, adding to the ancient landscape I was exploring. It felt like a classic, timeless scene from a medieval story.

photos.caption: Потерялся

The sunlight streaming through the narrow, rectangular windows on the left cast bright, dramatic shafts of light onto the rough stone steps and walls, illuminating the dust motes in the air and highlighting the texture of the old masonry. It felt like stepping back in time, imagining countless footsteps that had ascended and descended these very stairs over centuries as I continued my exploration of the old structure.

photos.caption: Эти коридоры видели столько ног...

The light filtering in from the side openings creates these dramatic, almost mystical streaks and shadows along the passage, really highlighting the texture of the stone. It felt like I was exploring a hidden passage or a dungeon, stretching far into the distance and promising more discoveries around the bend. It was an exciting and slightly eerie part of the castle

A functional bridge spans the deep chasm, leading directly towards the castle walls, with a few cars visible, showing how this historic site integrates with modern life. photos.caption: Хорошая машина, да?

photos.captionKii: I remember coming across this striking blue monument, likely a memorial, on this day. The vibrant blue concrete base really stands out, adorned with subtle patterns and a golden kneeling figure that appears to be a woman in reflection or mourning, with wreaths and flowers laid at its base. Above, two stone columns support a prominent red star, which often signifies a historical military or Soviet-era context. The inscription panel on the front suggests a dedication, and the surrounding trees create a quiet, somber atmosphere, making it a powerful place for remembrance.

Their tiny hand is resting near their head, and they're wearing a sweet light blue top. I can see a soft white towel beside them, which brings back memories of how they were wrapped during the ceremony, and a bit of a leopard print pattern on the other side. It was such a special day, and seeing them so serene like this was truly heartwarming.

Their tiny hand is near their mouth, a common baby gesture, and I love how calm and innocent their expression is, reflecting the tender atmosphere of the special day.

The baby is partially wrapped in soft white fabric, adding to the purity of the moment. It was a truly touching scene to capture.

In the background, another man in similar attire is partially visible, looking down, and I can glimpse what looks like an icon or religious artwork on the wall, reinforcing the sacred setting. The atmosphere felt solemn and attentive, as if I was witnessing an important address or ceremony.

The yellow patterned fabric draped around her head and shoulders adds such a lovely, vibrant touch to the scene. In the background, I can glimpse other people and a building with a hanging plant, suggesting we were enjoying an outdoor gathering or a sunny day out. It was such a warm and heartfelt interaction to witness and photograph.

We were outdoors, near a calm body of water—you can see the gentle ripples stretching across the background. The sunlight made the whole scene feel bright and cheerful. It was a wonderful moment capturing their innocent gaze and joy in the simple act of being outside.

photos.caption: Ось детского зла

The little one's face is mostly nestled into a soft, light pink fabric, perhaps a blanket or clothing, with just one bright blue eye peeking out and looking directly at me. A gentle hand, possibly mine or a loved one's, is softly holding the fabric near the baby's mouth, adding to the feeling of comfort and security. The warm, soft lighting creates such a peaceful and sweet atmosphere, highlighting the baby's delicate features. It was a truly precious glimpse into such innocence and new life.

photos.captionKii: I remember looking up at this incredibly ornate facade, likely part of a grand cathedral or church. The dark blue sky provided a stunning contrast to the abundance of shimmering gold details, from the large central winged figure, possibly an angel, to the multiple crosses atop the domes and smaller statues. The intricate patterns and religious iconography, along with the smaller figures in niches, truly showcased the craftsmanship and historical significance of the building. It felt like capturing a piece of majestic history and architectural beauty during my travels.

photos.caption: Sloboda

It was resting on a warm, wooden surface, and the soft lighting captured the cozy feeling of a quiet moment indoors. It was another small detail from a series of images capturing my daily comforts, a simple pleasure I enjoyed.

photos.caption: Экспонаты

The dim lighting really emphasizes the cozy, indoor atmosphere, perhaps I was about to make myself a quick, warm drink after a long day or simply documenting a small detail from a quiet moment. It's a simple shot, but it brings back the feeling of a pause and a bit of comfort.

The striped background, with its warm yellow and orange tones, created a cozy atmosphere in the room. It was such a tender scene, full of warmth and new life, and I wanted to remember the quiet joy of that instant.

You can see the big blue banner and the flags in the background, making it feel like a really significant public event. The energy was palpable, with everyone looking focused but also a bit nervous, waiting for the signal to go. It was cool to capture this moment of collective anticipation before a big athletic challenge.

The magazine was titled 'САМЫХ БОГАТЫХ УКРАИНЦЕВ,' which means 'THE RICHEST UKRAINIANS,' and it looks like it was published by 'ПРЕЗИДЕНТ.' It was a little snapshot of my interests at the time, combining a bit of personal style with an eye on current affairs or business news.

photos.caption: New shiny Ubuntu 7.04 packed — Приехала всего за какие-то 3 недели свеженькая Убунта...
photos.captionKii: I remember the excitement of receiving this package! It's a white padded envelope from TNT Post, laid out on a wooden surface. The labels show it shipped from Golden Telekom in Ukraine, and what really made me happy were the stickers for 'ubuntu', 'kubuntu', and 'edubuntu'. This was back when getting physical CDs or DVDs for Linux distributions was common, and I must have been eager to try out or install these open-source operating systems. It was a tangible piece of technology arriving right at my door, a cool moment to capture.

photos.caption: С Новым годом, наркоманчеги! — Вы достали шампанское, разорились на красную икру, нарядили елку, но все что-то не ймется? Приходите к нам, у нас много радости да и ресонт скоро закончим! :)
photos.captionKii: What a fun way to welcome the New Year! This shot captures our setup for the celebration, complete with a bottle of "Советское Шампанское" and a tin of delicious red caviar. We even spelled out "С НГ!" which is short for "С Новым Годом!" (Happy New Year!) on the table with some white powder, using a card to carefully shape the letters. It was a creative and festive touch to our New Year's Day!

photos.caption: Где же застолье? — Водка "Мерная" подскажет в трудную минуту где же подевалось застолье...
photos.captionKii: This close-up shot focuses on the silver cap of what looks like a bottle or container, with a vibrant blue line encircling it. I can clearly see text in Cyrillic, with prominent numbers "A20 09 06" which might be a date or batch code, and the word "ЗАСТОЛЬЕ" which translates to 'feast' or 'banquet'. There's also text referring to 'control of opening' and 'protection program', indicating a sealed product. Given the date of the photo, this cap likely belonged to a drink we were getting ready to enjoy for a New Year's Eve celebration.

photos.caption: Гурман / Gurme — Если вы идете к моему коту в гости, то купите ему оливки консервированные, без косточки разумеется. Он вас не разочарует :) И не забудьте фотоаппарат.
photos.captionKii: I caught such a funny moment of my cat playing with an olive! Its mouth is wide open, clearly focused on the olive it's holding with its paw. You can see its tongue and even a bit of its teeth as it's either biting down or just getting ready to. My tabby cat always finds the most interesting things to play with, and this green olive definitely had its full attention. It's moments like these that make me smile.

photos.caption:
Желаю Вам в 007... (смотрите Notes) — Это последняя чашка кофе в этом году.
Уверен, что в следующем будет больше вкусного, больше доброго, больше того, чего вам хочется.

Наведите курсор мыши на картинку и прочитайте мои пожелания вам!
photos.captionKii: This photo perfectly captures a delightful moment, featuring a warm cappuccino with a beautiful heart-shaped latte art, sitting next to a tempting slice of tiramisu. The tiramisu, dusted with cocoa powder and even featuring a small 'Tiramisu' tag, looks absolutely delicious, accompanied by a fork ready to dig in. It was such a lovely treat to enjoy.

photos.caption: Смесь для глинтвейна — Трубочки корицы, гвоздика, имбирь, изюм, апельсиноые корочки... попав в горячий "Кагор", все это становится прекрасным напитком -- глинтвейном.
photos.captionKii: This close-up shot captures a beautiful mix of aromatic spices and dried fruits on a white plate. I can clearly see prominent cinnamon sticks, pieces of dried ginger, and dark raisins, which were likely being prepared for a warm, festive drink or a holiday dish. It definitely brings back the cozy feeling of getting ready for Christmas.
